text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: (It feels as if all of the blood coursing through me freezes to a stop.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(Yet, my face always feels so hot. My legs quiver, and my whole body
begins to throb. It's so deafening, and I just want it to stop...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: (Stop, stop, STOP!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: —ber... Dober!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text: Dober!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Gasp!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
Dober, is something the matter? They've already called your group to
the starting gate.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Ah, s-sorry. I'll get going.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Bright
text_block_list.text:
...You're looking a little pale, Dober. If you are not feeling well,
then—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I'm fine, really.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I'm fine. Don't worry about me. It's just a scrimmage race.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: This is nothing for me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober is taking part in a scrimmage race with some of the
other students today. Naturally, I've decided to accompany the chief
trainer in the stands.
choice_data_list:
I was sure that she was feeling fine just before
this...

text_block_list.name: Chief Trainer
text_block_list.text: Indeed, but let's observe carefully. They're about to start now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: My concern for her well-being will soon become justified.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clank!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
The inside! Head for the inside! Save your energy! Keep it up! Go for
it, sis!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... gasp!
choice_data_list: (What?!)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober's performance in this scrimmage race is unfortunately a
far cry from the refined running I saw from her before.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(Don't look, don't look! Don't you even think about looking at the
stands! I have to concentrate... Concentrate on the race, and then...)

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Gasp!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober finds herself unable to muster the kind of run she had
achieved many times before, finishing in a lackluster eighth place.

text_block_list.name: Chief Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Bell... It would seem that as a young child, she had a number of bad
experiences that caused her to become quite nervous around others
now.

text_block_list.name: Chief Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Even so, she dedicated herself to her training while avoiding prying
eyes. The Mejiro estate has plenty of open space that afforded her
the opportunity.

text_block_list.name: Chief Trainer
text_block_list.text:
She became so used to training only around her maids and family
members... Now she struggles to compose herself in front of large
crowds and especially men.

text_block_list.name: Chief Trainer
text_block_list.text:
So on a day like today, I understand why she wasn't able to show off
the fruits of her training.

text_block_list.name: Chief Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Wanting to enter these races, wanting to win as badly as she does... It
must be so tough for her. But then again...

text_block_list.name: Chief Trainer
text_block_list.text: She never gives up, that girl.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I can't help but ruminate on the chief trainer's words even days after
the scrimmage races. One afternoon, while dining in the cafeteria at
lunchtime...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Is it okay if I sit here?
choice_data_list: Huh?! Y-yeah, sure!
Huh?! Y-yes, of course!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
That's a bit of an overreaction... Maybe it figures, though, given how I
don't think we've ever even made direct eye contact before.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry for suddenly approaching you like this, given we've never so
much as made direct eye contact before. It's just that... I'm pretty shy.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I just know that I would face a repeat of that scrimmage race if I just
let things be, however.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I just know that I would face a repeat of that scrimmage race if I just
let things be, however.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
So I was thinking that talking to you could be some good mental
training for me! You can do that much as my assistant trainer, right?
choice_data_list: Of course. I'd be happy to help.
Of course. I'd be happy to help.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
So I was hoping... maybe I could talk with you to help me build some
mental fortitude. Would that be okay?
choice_data_list: Of course. I'd be happy to help.
Of course. I'd be happy to help.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Thanks.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Thank you, and sorry again...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The chief trainer's assessment of Mejiro Dober's resolve is certainly
accurate—she really is trying her best. A conversation topic comes to
me in an instant.
choice_data_list: What made you decide to join the racing world?
What made you decide to join the racing world?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The chief trainer's assessment of Mejiro Dober's resolve is certainly
accurate—she really is trying her best. A conversation topic comes to
me in an instant.
choice_data_list: What made you decide to join the racing world?
What made you decide to join the racing world?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Why start with that...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh? This is sudden. Um...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
This may... sound pretty cliché, but as a Mejiro, it was the world I
grew up in close proximity to. It was easy to admire it, and I grew to
want to succeed in it myself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
This may... sound pretty cliché, but as a Mejiro, it was the world I
grew up in close proximity to. It was easy to admire it, and I grew to
want to succeed in it myself.

text_block_list.name: Young Dober
text_block_list.text: Ryan! Hey hey, Ryan! I want to race too! Let me race with you!

text_block_list.name: Young Ryan
text_block_list.text: Wh-whoa, Dober? What's gotten into you all of a sudden?

text_block_list.name: Young Dober
text_block_list.text: I want to race! Just like you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I felt that I was born to run and win.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
For something that she has labeled as cliché, I cannot help but notice
the sheer determination in her eyes.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
If I can't even properly run in a race, though, then all this time and
effort I've spent to realize my dream will have all been for naught. I
have to become stronger.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
My trainer's been doing everything she can to support me. I simply
must hurry up and show her I can win!
choice_data_list: I know that you have what it takes to win!
I know that you have what it takes to win!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: What? How can you just say that so casually?
choice_data_list: Because I really believe it!
I really believe that you do.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Mm... While I'm happy to hear you say that, I'm just still so weak...
choice_data_list: Because I really believe it!
I really believe that you do.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Gasp!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Gasp!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Is that so?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I don't think... I've met anyone quite like you before. Trainer is the
only other person to put as much faith in me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Hey, so after we're done eating, can you come with me for a bit? I
want to sign up for my next scrimmage race. That's another thing you
can do as an assistant trainer, right?
choice_data_list: Sure, let's go.
Okay, let's go.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Oh, after we're done eating, would you mind coming along with me?
I'd like to sign up for my next scrimmage race, if you don't mind.
choice_data_list: Sure, let's go.
Okay, let's go.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I'll show you what I'm truly capable of this time.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. I'd like to show everyone what I'm truly capable of. You
included.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I feel as though I've gotten just a touch closer with Mejiro Dober,
even if our encounter was a little bit awkward.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I feel as though I've gotten just a touch closer with Mejiro Dober,
even if our encounter was a little bit awkward.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It would soon prove to be only the beginning.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It would soon prove to be only the beginning.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
"Excuse me, Trainer? Are we going to start the day's session—Trainer?
Are you... sleeping?"

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...?! Trainer? Trainer?! Are you okay?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: S-somebody! Somebody please help, Trainer's—
